decision_log.rationale: No other models failed in the same time window. The internal error affected only this model.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, STATUS, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE STATUS = 'error' AND CREATED_AT BETWEEN DATEADD(hour, -1, '2026-03-12T10:00:00') AND DATEADD(hour, 1, '2026-03-12T10:00:00') ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
